series_title_en: CBT Core for Children — Stage 4: Regulation & Calm

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children pause when they feel upset or overwhelmed.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs a simple stop-breathe-choose regulation prompt.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child needs to stop, take a breath, and choose a calmer next step.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.title_en: What Can Help Me Calm Down?
items.therapeutic_goal: Help children identify calming tools that work for them.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child is building a personal list of calming strategies.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is choosing calming activities and discovering what helps.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs a concrete breathing exercise.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child needs guided breathing to feel calmer.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Ground children by noticing sensory details around them.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child feels upset and needs grounding through the senses.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child needs to ground using seeing, touching, hearing, smelling, and tasting.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children imagine a safe and calming place.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child benefits from a visual safe-place exercise.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child needs to imagine or draw a safe calm place.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Create a personal calm-tools card with favorite coping tools.
items.when_to_use: Use as a take-away card once the child has identified their top calming tools.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is choosing top calm tools for later use.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.
